items.name: Polymarket UI Kit
items.license_status: MIT verified from repository LICENSE and package metadata
items.reuse_policy: Code may be used, copied, modified, merged, published, distributed, sublicensed, and sold under MIT; retain the copyright and license notice in copies or substantial portions.
items.access_status: Free, public, no login required for repository, source components, documentation, or hosted registry endpoint.
skill_usage_notes: Reuse MarketCard, ProbabilityChart, ProbabilitySparkline, OrderbookPanel, LeaderboardTable, EvidenceRail, and ShareCard patterns for dense real-time monitoring interfaces.
Adapt its explicit loading, unavailable-data, disclosure, attribution, and fee-preview states for infrastructure, email queue, proxy/IP, DNS migration, and cloud inventory dashboards.
Use the token and theme files as a reference for dual-mode data-heavy dashboards; do not inherit Polymarket branding when generating unrelated products.
Use the hosted shadcn-style registry or copy repository source only while retaining the MIT notice.
Treat authenticated trading and live order submission as out of scope; the useful reusable layer is read-first UI, visualization, embeds, tables, and intent handoff.
